blocker: Finishing all 50 steps is compute-blocked: real GRPO on the HUD/Tinker backend runs ~75-90s/step (60 rollouts/step + transient 5xx retries), so 50 steps takes ~60-75min, far past the ~15min cap. Delivered runnable 50-step launcher + a REAL 9-step partial curve (no fabricated steps); run run_rft_50.sh unattended to finish.
one_line: Built runnable 50-step RFT launcher (wraps unmodified train_rft_v2.py) + stdlib curve analyzer + live-backend smoke; ran a real 9-step curve that reproduces the trend as flat/within-noise (slope +0.0012/step, projects ~0.574@step50); full 50 steps compute-blocked, documented not faked.
